title: Tom's Simple Storage Ashen Compat
description: A resource pack that adapts Tom's Simple Storage to the Ashen visual style.
body: Immerse yourself in a darker, more immersive Minecraft world with this resource pack that adapts Tom's Simple Storage to the Ashen visual style. Enjoy reimagined textures that perfectly complement the eerie and mysterious ambiance of Ashen, ensuring a cohesive and visually enriched storage experience.
